response.justification: Szabo brings valuable geospatial domain expertise through GISCollective and Green Map, plus distributed-systems experience from Dunnhumby's million-request infrastructure. However, his C++ experience is substantially outdated (2009–2015); recent work focuses on TypeScript, Node.js, and D. While his 15+ year track record demonstrates rapid mastery of new languages and complex systems, rebuilding modern C++ depth for a role requiring it as primary technology is a material concern. His willingness to expand expertise across the full stack is proven, but the specific C++ and routing-pipeline requirements may not align cleanly.
strengths: Deep geospatial domain expertise from GISCollective and Green Map projects, rare in candidates
Distributed-systems and high-performance infrastructure experience at Dunnhumby (millions of requests/sec)
Proven ability to rapidly acquire new languages and technical domains across 15+ year career
concerns: C++ experience is 10–15 years old; recent work heavily weighted toward TypeScript and Node.js
Geospatial background is in data collection/mapping, not routing-tile optimization or navigation pipelines
No recent systems-programming language experience (C++/Rust); would require significant ramp-up in primary tech
